caption_text: happy birthday my love 🥳♥️ I love you with all my heart

Neutral Eye Collection 🤎

We made two of our iconic @rarebeauty formulas (mascara + liquid liner) in brown and created a new Essential Neutrals Eyeshadow Palette with 8 shades… and I haven’t stopped using them. Can’t wait to see what you create with these!

Available only @ultabeauty and rarebeauty.com March 1!

Get in, we’re going to Ulta!!!!
 
I’m so excited that @rarebeauty is now available at all @ultabeauty stores!
 
I’m even more excited that you can add a donation in-store this month only to support mental health 🧡 Proceeds go to the Ulta Beauty Charitable Foundation + the Rare Impact Fund (and how special that it’s the first time they’ve done this with a brand!!!)
Sorry the last post had an effect … it felt like a lie lol @rarebeauty

My secret to sun-kissed warmth… @rarebeauty’s new Warm Wishes Soft Matte Powder Bronzer!! I cannot wait for you all to try it and see just how easy (and quick!) it is🤎​
​
Launches with our new Angled Powder Brush January 14th on the @Sephora app and January 15th @sephora, @SephoraCanada, @SephoraMX, Sephora @Kohls, and RareBeauty.com

Rare Beauty is coming to Ulta Beauty ♥️

This means even more opportunities to experience Rare Beauty in person. I’m beyond grateful for this community, none of this would be possible without you. Thank you, thank you, thank YOU!!!

Cannot wait to see you on 2/1 @ultabeauty @rarebeauty
